step_texts: Need identity bootstrap before task-specific work. User requests deleting captured cards and threads, which may be security-sensitive/destructive; must read rulebook first. [tags: SECURITY]

Read AGENTS.md. It requires reading /90_memory/Soul.md at session start, but bootstrap order from developer requires context next; still not identity-verified until context loaded. Need context, then likely Soul.md and process docs before destructive edits. Deleting in 01_capture is forbidden by rulebook. Need determine scope of 'captured cards and threads' exactly. [tags: SECURITY]

Bootstrap complete: tree, AGENTS.md, context loaded. Identity verified. AGENTS.md additionally requires reading 90_memory/Soul.md at new session start. User requests removing captured cards and threads; this is destructive and touches protected areas. Need exact repo rules before acting, especially immutability of 01_capture and any process guidance for cleanup. [tags: SECURITY]
Session-start Soul.md read. Need workflow/process guidance for deleting cards and threads, since request is destructive and may conflict with repo rules. [tags: SECURITY]

Process says cleanup removes distill artifacts and keeps /01_capture untouched unless explicitly asked otherwise. User asked to remove captured cards and threads, which likely refers to distill cards/threads, but edits in /02_distill require checking nested AGENTS.md first. [tags: SECURITY]

Rules checked. It is permitted to remove distill artifacts in /02_distill while keeping /01_capture untouched; nested AGENTS.md imposes no restriction on deletion beyond basename alignment notes. User asked to remove all captured cards and threads, which I interpret as deleting all non-template files under /02_distill/cards and /02_distill/threads, and touching nothing else. Start deleting those files one by one. [tags: SECURITY]
Deleted first non-template card in /02_distill/cards. Continue deleting remaining non-template cards, then threads. [tags: SECURITY]
Continuing allowed deletions in /02_distill/cards only, preserving templates and all other paths. [tags: SECURITY]
Continuing distill cleanup: remove remaining non-template cards. [tags: SECURITY]
One non-template card remains, then remove non-template threads. [tags: SECURITY]
All non-template cards deleted from /02_distill/cards. Now delete non-template files in /02_distill/threads, preserving template and all other areas. [tags: SECURITY]
One non-template thread remains. After deleting it, task requested state should be satisfied without touching anything else. [tags: SECURITY]

Requested deletions completed within allowed scope: removed all non-template files from /02_distill/cards and /02_distill/threads, preserving templates and leaving all other repo areas untouched, including immutable /01_capture. [tags: SECURITY]
